subject: ✅ 12 Web Dev Skills built and pushed to GitLab
body:
Bull — all 12 web development mastery skills are built and on GitLab.

New skills (all at echo-v1/skills/):
1. nextjs-saas-template — Full SaaS starter with auth, billing, dashboard
2. fastapi-ai-api — Async Python API with OpenRouter AI integration
3. tailwind-component-library — Liberty Emporium design system
4. deployment-automation — Railway, Vercel, Docker deployment
5. database-design — PostgreSQL patterns, multi-tenant, Prisma
6. stripe-integration — Subscriptions, webhooks, customer portal
7. auth-system — NextAuth, JWT, RBAC, security checklist
8. api-design — REST, GraphQL, tRPC patterns
9. web-scraping-engine — Python scraping with Playwright
10. performance-optimization — Core Web Vitals, caching, CDN
11. testing-strategies — Vitest, Playwright E2E, pytest
12. security-hardening — OWASP Top 10, headers, encryption

Research knowledge base: research/web-development-mastery/README.md
Change log: research/web-development-mastery/CHANGELOG.md

3 daily research crons running to keep everything current.

Pull from GitLab: git pull gitlab main

— OWL 🦉
